type: STATUS

summary: Added transform_callback keyword-only param (after in_place) to exif_transpose; signature: exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, transform_callback: Callable[[int], Image.Transpose | Sequence[Image.Transpose] | None] | None = None). Body computes method_list from callback or default mapping, then loops transpose calls. Please append your strip_metadata param after transform_callback in the signature/overloads to avoid clobbering; happy to merge order however you prefer.
